text:
Once upon a time, in a small, sleepy town surrounded by endless woods, there lived a curious cat named Felix.

Felix loved going on exploration trips. One day, he discovered a peculiar circle of stones that glowed softly at night. Intrigued, he slept there every night until dawn. One day, a wise old owl observed Felix and whispered, "That's no stone. It's Magic Pebble. Listen closely."

The owl advised Felix to listen to the pebble's stories. Each night, Felix would listen to the pebble, each telling a story from ancient times. Legends spoke of a great hero from ancient times who saved the town. This brave knight vanished one night, leaving only a legend.

Inspired, Felix set out on a quest to find the hero. He discovered hidden passages behind ancient statues and learned of a hero's quest to rescue a beautiful princess.

With magical shoes that could cross the river of shadows, Felix embarked on his adventure. He crossed lakes
